things.name: Ala-Archa National Park
things.description: Stunning Alpine gorge 40km from Bishkek with glaciers, hiking and rafting in the Tian Shan

things.name: Osh Bazaar
things.description: Central Asia's most colourful market with kumiss (fermented mare's milk), dried fruits and herbs

things.name: State History Museum
things.description: Soviet murals and Kyrgyz history from the Manas epic to Soviet collectivisation

things.name: Ala-Too Square
things.description: Central square with the White House, changing of the guard and the Manas statue

things.name: Burana Tower & Balbal Stones
things.description: 11th-century minaret remnant with a field of Turkic stone warrior figures

things.name: Issyk-Kul Lake
things.description: World's second largest alpine lake - warm enough to swim in, ringed by snow mountains

things.name: Nomadic Games Festival
things.description: World Nomad Games festival with eagle hunting, kok-boru (horseback polo) and yurt competitions

things.name: Erkindik Boulevard
things.description: Tree-lined central boulevard with the Russian Orthodox cathedral and White House

things.name: Central Asian Eagle Hunting
things.description: Day trips to witness traditional Kazakh eagle hunters in the mountains

things.name: Panfilov Park
things.description: City park with a Soviet-era Ferris wheel and the Manas epic mural
